commit.subject: Revert "LU-8066 obd: final pieces for sysfs/debugfs support."
commit.message:
Revert "LU-8066 obd: final pieces for sysfs/debugfs support."

This reverts commit 0100ab268c3120aa84847a88a2493988f38dee6b.

Reverting this patch to determine if these changes are causing LU-10804 obdfilter-survey test_3a: lprocfs_alloc_obd_stats()) ASSERTION( obd->obd_proc_entry != ((void *)0) ) failed; LBUG

Test-Parameters: trivial envdefinitions=SLOW=yes testlist=obdfilter-survey osscount=1 ostcount=7 mdscount=1 mdtcount=1

Test-Parameters: envdefinitions=SLOW=yes testlist=obdfilter-survey osscount=1 ostcount=7 mdscount=1 mdtcount=1

Change-Id: Ia07c0d3ffe672f6e34980ec876f7c5ed5a8e8578
Signed-off-by: James Nunez <james.a.nunez@intel.com>
